name: Goblock
author: Poki
description: Goblock is a puzzle game where you place colorful blocks to complete adorable pixel artworks! Start with simple small pictures and work your way up to bigger, more challenging designs. Need a little help? Use the hint function to guide you! Can you complete every masterpiece and become the ultimate pixel artist? How to play Goblock? Click and hold to move the block, release to place it. Who created Goblock? Goblock is created by WeDoYouPlay. Play their other creative and entertaining games on Poki : Hospital Stories: Doctor Soccer , Hospital Stories: Doctor Rugby , Hospital Stories: Doctor Basketball , Nonogram , Words Emoji , Circus Contest , Word Chains , and Sugar Eyes ! How can I play Goblock for free? You can play Goblock for free on Poki. Can I play Goblock on mobile devices and desktop? Goblock can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
